Overrides.Override: +30 to maximum Mana per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Mind
+30 to maximum Mana per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Mind
+30 to maximum Mana per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Mind
+30 to maximum Mana per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Mind
+30 to maximum Mana per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Mind
+30 to maximum Mana per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Mind
+30 to maximum Mana per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Mind

PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^xD02090This build was made during Necro Settler chaos & divine inflation about item price , just give a rough idea^7 .^7
^xE05030It's a journey , so I made some errors & learn from it.
^7 ^x7070FFTL/DR : This build is mana-rf it's scale extremly well when you get Indigon & fall off in a little Very high budget for the price invested More aoe , more dmg , less defense. Require to burn mana with arcane cloak (mana spender) = more dmg^7
Pantheon use: With Purity of Element Brine King Tukohama
Without Purity of Element Brine King Garukan (with a topaz or shappir flask with 40% reduced shock effect)
Mageblood setup (with boots chill&freeze avoidance / shock avoid + stun avoid flask) Solaris Tukohama
^xE05030Couldn't buy & didn't use a "Graven Secret" was too expensive early on & nullify Militant faith Dominus^7 ^xE05030(48% elemental dmg recoup) very good if you can afford it before Militant Faith ^7
^xFFFF77Lvl 16 RF transition^7 ^x70FF70Gear : vendor recipe iron ring + red skill gem = Ruby ring + benchcraft fire res^7
^xB97123Tips : Get around 100-120 fire resistance^7^xAF6025 , Heavy belt reward^7
^xFFFF77First Ascendancy:^7 ^xAF6025^xAF6025Tips:^7^xAF6025 use both purity of fire and element^7^xAF6025 , Jade amu reward
^xAF6025^xFFFF77Act 6 Beginning^7^7 ^x70FF70Gear: Kikazaru x2 5c/e^7^7
^xFFFF77End of Campaign^7 ^x70FF70^x70FF70Gear:^7^x3F6DB3 ^x70FF70Rise of phoenix 25c , Mindspiral 3c^7
^xAF6025Tips: Do 2nd & 3rd lab in Act 10 and allocate zealoth oath when you get "Divine Guidance" Ascendancy (mana burn from mind over matter effect)
^xFFFF77Transition Mana-rf^7 ^x70FF70Gear: Ivory Tower 40-50c^7
^xAF6025Tips: If you have issue again chaos dmg use the brand mastery & the scorching setup from indigon build^7
^xAF6025 ^7^7^xFFFF77^xFFFF77Day 2^7:^7 ^xFFFF77^x70FF70Gear: Jewel Mana/int / Max res or Dot Multi 10-100c^7 ( harvest bench to swap res into fire) ^7^7^x70FF70Annoint : Brink of Death^7 ^xFFFF77 Day 3:^7 ^x70FF70Gear: Prism Guardian 40c Shavronne Ring 3-6d (remove mana regen) Flask charge on hit (self-craft) Shaper's Touch 10-30c^7
^xAF6025Tips : Fix Chaos res & get a way to have mana recovery again uniq Ring effect Shaper's touch good scaling early but if you need extra suffix to fix issue pick a Rare^7 ^xAF6025(wasn't good enough for me)^7
^xFFFF77Day 4:^7 ^x70FF70Gear : Indigon 6-8d Watcher's eye -> Clarity mod 12d (cheapest at 3d) Corruscating Flask : 30-50c Mana Flask 27+% qual : 30c^7 ^x70FF70Ivory Tower 6L: 4-6d^7
^xAF6025Tips: Indigon reduce your ES , make sure to drop % increased fire dmg and have the Watcher's Eye to transition Mana flask roll Forbodding & beastary bleed-cb^7 ^xAF6025You need 10-15 map to get used to Forboding , just spam arcane cloak & become a circle of Death^7
^xFFFF77Day 5:^7 ^x70FF70Gear: Cluster Jewel x2: 3d each^7^x70FF70 (only this 3notable)^7 ^x70FF70Weapon: (Wand of Scepter) Mana fractured 3d + Woe Essence spam^7 ^x70FF70Awakened Gem: 100c/e x5^7 ^x70FF70(average)^7
^xFFFF77Day 6:^7 ^x70FF70Gear: Militant Faith -Dominus 10%mana as ES 6d^7 ^x70FF70Unnatural Instinct 8d^7 ^x70FF70Helical: 5d spite essence spam^7 ^x70FF70Split personality Mana/ Int 3d x2^7
^xFFFF77Day 7:^7 ^x70FF70GreatWolf Amulet : 15d^7 ^x70FF70Boot T1 mana fractured : 1d^7 ^x70FF70(Harvest chaos or essence)^7 ^x70FF70^xFFFF77^x70FF70Belt 12-15% Int Implicit: 4-5d^7 ^x70FF70(Spite Essence spam)^7^7 ^7 ^xFFFF77Day 9 :^x70FF70 ^x70FF70Shavronne ring %int & cata : 30d^7 ^x70FF70Glove Fracture mana 2d^7 ^x70FF70- Crafting 45d (unlucky)^7 harvest defense until double t1 , then exalt & eldritch annul suffix for t1 int
^xFFFF77Day10^7 ^x70FF70Tattoo Tukoama shaman (life reg) : 10c/e^7
^xE05030(testing squire & elder/shaper scepter basicaly worse than just swapping determ into zealotry) around 20-40% more dmg but you loose Flesh & stone and have Resistance issues to fix^7. ^xE050307M(squire) vs 4.7 or 5.6M (Zealotry)^7
^xFFFF77Squire swap^7: ^x70FF70Weapon : 8d-16d to craft Squire:2d^7
^xE05030 (forget the mageblood and flesh & stone + enlighten) , respect to alira & 1-2 jewel with res to fix res issue^7
^xFFFF77Better Mageblood setup^7: ^x70FF70Journey Tattoo of Mind : 3d x3 (can cost more)^7 ^x70FF70Better Helical : 150d^7 ^x70FF70Annoint : Mind drinker (if Thrill Killer is changed) , otherwise Primal Spirit or back to Brink of Death^7 ^x70FF70220c^7
^xE05030(can probably swap back to squire for more dmg but I like tankiness)^7 ^xE05030We need the % mana on kill during mapping specialy without the mana flask to sustain^7
^xE05030(I gamble into a mageblood you can stay the belt %int, keep the setup of day 10 & maybe try to put Journey tattoo)^7
^xFFFF77End-Game Setup ^x70FF70Journey Tattoo of Mind : 4dx1 Impossible Escape "The Impaler : 1d^7^7 ^x70FF70Double Corrupt Indigon : 2d x2 tries (lucky) -4d^7 ^x70FF70Double Corrupt Squire : 3d x12 tries , sold some of them -12d^7
^x7070FFList of upgrade I cannot/didn't do: Sporeguard annoint -> vaal orb rare -> mythic orb A better militant faith (mana node back) Remake my prefix boots into Immune chill from veiled orb & craft Immune Freeze. and swap Pantheon Weapon(squire setup) with mana mod prefix and exalt suffix 4 mod Jewel with Maximum Energy shield/Spell power
^7Better Trading Link:^7
